workloads.prompt: In two sentences, explain why a personal local-model choice should prefer wall-clock time and reliability over lab-grade metric purity.
Return exactly this JSON object with no markdown or extra text: {"name":"status","arguments":{"run_id":"stage1-test","include_details":false}}

Read this policy: repository files define executable truth; durable notes explain intent and history; generated evidence requires review before becoming policy. Summarize the precedence in three short bullets and do not invent new rules.
